features.evidence: manual 2026-06-01 — full live end-to-end against remote Qdrant Cloud (memelens, 106 pts, named vectors visual+irony) + Neo4j Aura (104 Meme / 103 MemeTemplate). (1) compute_mutation_metrics.py completed with 0 errors over 103 templates; (2) GET /mutations HTTP round-trip returned 103 templates with correct schema (member_count/velocity/trending_mutation/accumulating_baseline), trending_only=true -> 0; (3) TC-VEC-003 unit-length centroid verified offline AND live read-back (persisted centroid_visual L2==1.0 to Aura); (4) TC-FAIL-009 small-sample guardrail verified live (default MIN=5 -> all 103 accumulating, velocity 0.0). Computed/trending path (no real template has >=5 members) verified via in-memory real-Qdrant integration (6-member unit centroid; 7-day-aged history -> velocity 0.951 > 0.15 -> trending=True) and a MIN=1 live verification run that persisted real unit-length centroid arrays to Aura + drift_score to cloud Qdrant (read back), then reverted to the MIN=5 default state (0 centroids, 103 accumulating). Discipline grep clean on both new files; import backend.main OK, /mutations route registered. NOTE: actual visual vectors in the live collection are 512-dim (spec CLAUDE.md 2.2 says 1024); mutation math is dimension-agnostic and unaffected. Docker not used (datastores are cloud); backend.ingest skipped (data/images empty -> would no-op-quarantine; collection already populated).
